payload.answer: The new statement appears to update the project status of the same Brain Slack agent from planned/open to MVP implemented. This is a possible project state transition rather than a direct duplicate.
citations: Existing project state - The Brain Slack agent is planned, status=open
New - The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented

entity_resolution.reason: Both statements refer to the Brain Slack agent; the new statement specifies its MVP implementation status.

evidence.existing_fact: The Brain Slack agent is planned, status=open
evidence.new_fact: The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented
evidence.reason: Both facts refer to the Brain Slack agent, and the new fact indicates implementation progress that may change the prior planned/open status.
